inter_episode_relations.description: Episode A occurs earlier than Episode B in local narrative or discourse order.

samples.subject: The heist plan is revealed to the crew
samples.object: The team executes the vault break-in
samples.description: The plan disclosure happens before the vault break-in.

inter_episode_relations.description: Episode A directly triggers Episode B as an immediate consequence. Use only when the text provides clear causal evidence.

samples.subject: A containment breach releases a lethal pathogen
samples.object: The city is placed under emergency lockdown
samples.description: The breach directly results in a citywide lockdown.

inter_episode_relations.description: Two episodes are juxtaposed to emphasize contrast or reversal in tone, state, or outcome.

samples.subject: A hero is celebrated at a public ceremony
samples.object: The same hero privately admits fear and doubt
samples.description: Public acclaim contrasts with private vulnerability.

inter_episode_relations.description: Episode A provides additional detail, explanation, or background that expands Episode B.

samples.subject: A suspect refuses to talk during interrogation
samples.object: A flashback reveals the suspect’s prior deal with the police
samples.description: The flashback expands the interrogation by supplying prior context.

inter_storyline_relations.description: Storyline A creates conditions that make Storyline B possible or significantly more likely by providing necessary context, state, opportunity, or resources. This relation captures positive causal influence at the storyline level.

reasoning_semantics.logic: A.impact aligns with or satisfies B.cause

samples.subject: Discovery of the true nature of the simulated world
samples.object: Organized resistance against the controlling system
samples.description: Recognizing that reality is artificially constructed provides the shared understanding required for coordinated resistance to emerge.

inter_storyline_relations.description: Storyline A obstructs, delays, or undermines the progress or resolution of Storyline B by weakening its necessary conditions, disrupting its process, or preventing its intended outcome. This relation captures negative causal influence at the storyline level.

reasoning_semantics.logic: A.impact contradicts or degrades B.cause, B.process, or B.result

samples.subject: Internal betrayal within the resistance movement
samples.description: Betrayal disrupts trust and coordination, directly obstructing the resistance’s ability to overthrow the regime.
